Good service, the waiting system is questionable.

reviews.comment:
En temporada se complica por la poca cantidad de surtidores habilitados. Hay que ir o muy temprano o cuando todo el mundo esta en la playa. Fuera de temporada igualmente tiene pocos empleados pero no hay tantos problemas de colas largas

(Translated by Google)
During the season, it's complicated by the limited number of pumps open. You have to go either very early or when everyone is at the beach. Off-season, there are also few employees, but there aren't as many problems with long lines.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN6MGZ5ZFBREAE

reviews.comment:
Malísima y poco profesional la atención telefónica que recibí de la parte administrativa del lugar, no así del personal de playa o de la cafetería. Falta de empatía y ganas de dar una respuesta al cliente.

(Translated by Google)
The telephone service I received from the administrative staff was terrible and unprofessional, unlike the beach staff or the cafeteria staff. They lacked empathy and any willingness to provide a response to the customer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURUdi1Ub3ZnRRAB
